description: Style NoteWith this Climalite enabled performance T-shirt, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, meaning you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsBlack polo T-shirt that has short sleeves, short buttoned placket, branding on the right sleeve, stitch detailing, adidas patented three stripes on the left shoulder and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
